little moments i keep close

A Letter For You

Hii babyy, just want to take time out of my day to say how much I appreciate you each and every single day. I know sometimes your efforts, your feelings, your hard times go unnoticed by so many people, maybe sometimes by your family. I wanna say I'm incredibly grateful to have you.

You are the flower in my garden of thorns. You are the beat in my heart that keeps me going. You are everything and more than what I need in life.

To be incredibly honest, sometimes I think I'm too nice, but when I think about it more, I come to a realization — there is no such thing as being too nice. When it comes to the love of my life, which is you, my agenda every day is to love, cherish, protect, and make you happy the best way I can.

Please remember that you are enough, that I don't need anything more from you — being you, and only yourself, is perfect and more than enough. If someone doesn't appreciate you for who you are, I'll be here until my dying day.

I love you so much and forever, my sweetheart. I'll never ever take you for granted. This is my equivalent of giving flowers, and yes, it's not the same as flowers. So I want to know... is it okay if I send you flowers?

I looove you sayang, don't ever think otherwise. I'm in a position where I have the most beautiful girl I've ever seen in my life. No other girls can swindle my eyes away from you. You're the best, perfect, and beautiful in my eyes. Wuvvv youu so muchh, my beautiful queen 💗💗💗

yours always, forever yours

so... is it okay if I send you flowers? 🌷

made with all my love, for you and only you 💗
